case_title: WASHINGTON, BARBARA ANN vs. SHEAHAN, DANIEL ANTHONY et al

BARBARA ANN WASHINGTON DECEASED: COPY OF DEATH CERTIFICATE GIVEN TO THE COURT BY MR. WASHINGTON. CASE WILL BE DISMISSED ON 9/15/95, MR. WASHINGTON'S APPEARANCE IS NOT REQUIRED PER THE COURT.
